content.en:
Autumn Leaf Source Ancestor, one of the three supreme beings in the Tianlin Realm, is far superior in strength to the Heavenly Wind Source God, with the title of Source Ancestor, above the ordinary Source God.

Whether it was the Heavenly Wind Source God or the Netherworld Hall Master, they didn't dare to be presumptuous in front of the Autumn Leaf Source Ancestor.

"As a supreme being, why are you fighting in the Tianlin Realm?"

Genzu Akiba asked.

The Supreme One is not allowed to fight at will in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, otherwise if it doesn't matter, if it evolves into the Yuan Extreme Realm and becomes the Yuan Extreme Abyss, then one day, the Heavenly Lin Realm will also become the Heavenly Extreme Abyss.

As one of the three oldest supreme beings in the Tianlin Realm, Akiba Genzu naturally didn't want to see this scene.

"Akiba Source Ancestor, the Heavenly Wind Source God killed thirteen first-class invincible people in my Netherworld Temple, and also killed a Void Child!"

The Nether Hall Lord said.

The Heavenly Wind Source God hurriedly said, "This is the Netherworld Temple's first attack on our Heavenly Wind Sea, and I will only take revenge." "

"Forget it, I also know a thing or two about what you did before, and the matter has come to this point, I don't care what hatred you have, from today onwards, it's over. As for the war between you, end it too, otherwise the impact will be too great!" Akiba Genzu ordered.

The Netherworld Hall Lord was a little unwilling, but he still responded, "Yes!"

He didn't dare to disagree, otherwise Akiba Genzu would have the strength to kill him.

Having become a supreme being, he has almost stood at the peak level of the Source Sea, and he doesn't want to fall.

The Heavenly Wind Source God naturally agreed, he already wanted to end it, and he was very happy to let the Netherworld Temple suffer heavy losses this time.

As for attacking the invincible in the future, he won't do it again, otherwise Akiba Genzu is afraid that he won't let him go.

......

Jinhe World.

The invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea and the Netherworld Temple have all received the news and know that the two sides have stopped fighting.

As a result, the invincible people of Tianfeng Sea left the Jinhe World one by one and returned to the Tianlin Realm.

They have to return to Tianfeng Sea and submit tasks one by one to receive contribution points.

Ye Tian also submitted the task, this time he killed many invincibles in the Netherworld, including many third-class invincibles, and killing a third-class invincible rewarded 1 billion contribution points, plus the bounties of other invincibles.

In the end, Ye Tian was rewarded with nearly 10 billion contribution points.

It can be said that Ye Tian is almost not short of contribution points now, which is enough to buy countless resources.

Not long after he returned, the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea, the current Heavenly Wind Source God, summoned him.

"The Heavenly Wind Source God, the new Supreme One, summoned me?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, but he still went.

Soon, he saw the Heavenly Wind Source Sea.

"Meet the Chief!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Heavenly Wind Source God looked at Ye Tian and said with a smile: "Ye Tian, you are very good, I heard that you have fought back and forth with Luo Ge, the son of the void of the Netherworld Temple, do you want to become the son of the void?"

Ye Tian hurriedly said, "Chief, I don't know much about the Son of the Void, so I don't know how to answer. "

"That's right. "The Heavenly Wind Source God also knows that many invincible beings don't know about the Void Child, just because the Void Child is a name.

So, he explained, "The title of the Son of the Void is not determined by us forces, but by the Void Source Temple. "

In the narration of the Heavenly Wind Source God, Ye Tian understood the general situation.

It turns out that in a mysterious place in the Source Sea, there is an endless and magnificent temple - the Void Source Temple.

And the Son of the Void is the evaluation obtained through the assessment in the Void Source Temple, and once he becomes the Son of the Void, he will get a lot of benefits.

At this time, the Heavenly Wind Source God said again: "The Source Sea is very large, not only an Eternal Heaven and Earth in the Tianlin Realm, but also other Eternal Heaven and Earth, among these Eternal Heaven and Earth, there are many Void Children, but the Void Source Hall can ignore the distance of the Source Sea and communicate with each Eternal Heaven and Earth. Once you become a child of the void, you can travel to other eternal worlds through the Void Source Hall in the future, which can save countless time. Moreover, there are more benefits that can only be known if you become a child of the void. "

"I want to participate in the assessment, but not now!" Ye Tiandao: "I have only been promoted to a third-class invincible person for a long time, and there is still room for improvement, and if I go to participate now, I may not be guaranteed to become a 100% child of the void." "

"Yes, if you want to take the test, come to me when the time comes!" the Heavenly Wind Source God assured.

"Thank you, Chief!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, he left the Tianfeng Sea.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to practice hard, striving to be promoted to the limit of a third-class invincible, and then he would participate in the assessment of the Son of the Void when the time came.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to create an invincible ancestral skill, although it was not a lot to improve his strength in this way, but it added up a lot!

And he also bought a lot of precious resources to assist in cultivating Wanyuan Guiru, copying his body to perfect Wanyuan Guiru at all costs, and he collapsed I don't know how many times, and consumed a lot of resources before condensing it again and again.

After the strength is strong, the resources required to replicate the body once are also a little more, but in fact, more resources come from the source sea.

After Ye Tian became a source sea life, he realized that he had not paid any price for copying his body countless times before copying his body, so where did the energy come from?

Now I know that the energy comes from the source energy in the source sea.

However, after the strength is strong, even if the copy body extracts the energy of the source sea, it cannot be condensed instantly, and it still needs some resources to assist.

Of course, for other invincible people with special clones, the price Ye Tian paid was not a price at all.

Other invincible people with special clones, once the clone falls, the body will also be hit hard, and it will take endless years to recover, and it will take an incomparably huge price to condense the clone again, and each condensation is enough to consume a certain amount of their worth.

Unbeknownst to you, the Dark Forbidden Realm has survived hundreds of catastrophes.

And on this day, Ye Tian's Wanyuan Returning Ruins had finally perfected to the fourth consummation realm, and his cultivation had also reached the limit of a third-class invincible, and his invincible ancestral skills had mastered many doors.

Compared with the past, Ye Tian's strength was much stronger.

If he fought with Rogo again, he could easily defeat Rogo, but it would be a little difficult to kill Rogo, after all, when he reached the level of a third-class invincible, unless the difference in strength was too large, he would be sure to kill him.

He was able to kill other third-class invincibles, but those third-class invincibles were too weak.

And being able to become a child of the void itself was the top existence of the third-rank invincible in the Tianlin Realm, and it was naturally difficult for him to kill such a third-rank invincible.
